explore.title: Find someone who fits your vibe
explore.subtitle: Filter by archetype, art style, tags, and age. Sort by what's hot right now.
explore.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No companions match} one {# companion} other {# companions}}
explore.emptySubtitle: Try removing a few filters or clearing the search.

featured.title: Meet someone new today
featured.subtitle: Hand-picked personalities, ready to chat. Hover any card to see her in motion.

pick.headline: Start chatting with {name}
pick.subheadline: Sign up free to send your first message — no credit card required. Already have an account? Sign in to jump back in.
pick.noAccount: Free to start. Premium features available later.

chat.title: Chat
chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.errorQuota: You have reached your daily message limit. Your quota resets at midnight UTC.
chat.imageFailed: Couldn't generate the image. Try again.
chat.noConversationsYet: No conversations yet — pick someone to start chatting.

image.upgradeRequired: Photos are a Premium feature. {link} to unlock.
image.tokensRequired: You're out of tokens this month. {link} to top up.
image.failed: Failed to generate image. Please try again.

quota.headline: Want to keep talking with {name}?
quota.subheadline: You've used today's free messages. Upgrade now and pick up right where you left off.

tokens.headline: Just one more thing from {name}
tokens.subheadline: Photos, voice and videos run on tokens. Top up so {name} can keep showing you more.

premium_feature.headline: {name} saves the spicy stuff for Premium
premium_feature.subheadline: Photos, voice, and long-term memory are part of the Premium plan.

photoComposer.title: Ask for a photo
photoComposer.subtitle: Pick a vibe — or just tap send

premium_monthly.name: Premium
premium_monthly.description: Unlock advanced features and monthly tokens.

premium_yearly.name: Premium Yearly
premium_yearly.description: Same great features at a discounted annual rate.

premium_plus_monthly.name: Premium Plus
premium_plus_monthly.description: Maximum tokens, premium AI, and video generation.

premium_plus_yearly.name: Premium Plus Yearly
premium_plus_yearly.description: All Premium Plus features at a discounted annual rate.

upgrade.title: Choose your plan
upgrade.subtitle: Upgrade to unlock more tokens, better AI, and exclusive features.

exitIntent.headline: Don't leave them hanging
exitIntent.subheadline: Stay tonight and they're yours — half price on your first month, no strings attached.

manage.title: Manage subscription
manage.cancelConfirm: Are you sure? Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period.
manage.cancelAtPeriodEnd: Your subscription will not renew at the end of the current period.

tokens.title: Buy tokens
tokens.subtitle: Tokens never expire. Use them for images, voice, and video.
tokens.mockMode: Billing is not configured. Purchases will be credited as a stub for development.

plansSection.tokenPacksHint: One-time top-ups. Tokens never expire and carry over.

errors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

completeProfile.title: Almost done
completeProfile.subtitle: To comply with age verification requirements, we need to confirm you are 18 or older before you can access the app.
completeProfile.over18: I am 18 or older and agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and 2257 Statement

errors.underage: You must be 18 or older to use this service.
errors.mustAgree: You must confirm you are 18 or older and agree to the terms.

tryBuilder.title: Design your dream companion
tryBuilder.subtitle: Pick her look — we'll bring her to life. No signup required.
tryBuilder.hint: Generation takes ~10 seconds. Limited free previews per hour.

cta.heading: She's waiting for you
cta.body: Sign up to give her a name, story, and start chatting.

errors.rateLimitedHour: You've used your free previews for this hour. Try again later — or sign up for unlimited.
errors.rateLimitedDay: You've reached today's free preview limit. Sign up to keep going.
errors.previewLimit: You've created enough previews. Pick one and sign up to continue.

builder.title: Create a character
builder.upgradeRequired: You have reached the free tier limit of 1 custom character.
builder.draftsLimitReached: You have {max} open drafts. Finish one or upgrade to keep building.

hints.customSliders: Fine-tune the personality with sliders below.
hints.previewIntro: Generate up to 5 sets of 4 photos. Pick the one you love — she'll look like that throughout your chat.

placeholders.relationshipCustom: Met at a music festival, ex-boss, old crush...
placeholders.uniquePersonality: Add personality traits, behavior and tone of voice
placeholders.uniqueLooks: Add visual details, body type, and visual attributes

realisticVision.label: RealVisXL
realisticVision.description: ~$0.025/img · ~20-50 s · photorealistic portraits. ⚠ NSFW filter black-frames spicy scenes.

fastSdxl.label: Fast SDXL
fastSdxl.description: ~$0.005/img · ~5-10 s · anime baseline. May filter explicit prompts.

fluxSchnell.label: FLUX schnell
fluxSchnell.description: ~$0.003/img · ~5-10 s · fastest realistic. No negative prompt.

fluxDev.label: FLUX dev (recommended for realistic)
fluxDev.description: ~$0.025/img · ~7-30 s · photoreal, handles spicy-clothed scenes without black frames. No negative prompt.

cyberrealisticPony.label: CyberRealistic Pony
cyberrealisticPony.description: ~$0.05/img · photoreal NSFW. ⚠ first hit 2-3 min cold, then 30-60 s.

ponyRealism.label: Pony Realism
ponyRealism.description: ~$0.05/img · photoreal NSFW alternative. ⚠ cold start applies.

waiIllustrious.label: WAI Illustrious
waiIllustrious.description: ~$0.05/img · top anime NSFW. ⚠ first hit 2-3 min cold, then 30-60 s.

hassakuIllustrious.label: Hassaku Illustrious
hassakuIllustrious.description: ~$0.05/img · stylized anime NSFW. ⚠ cold start applies.

review.regenerateHint: Changes here update the prompt. Go back to the preview step to regenerate the image.

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.previewLimitReached: You have reached the 5 preview sets limit for this draft.
errors.previewSafetyFiltered: The image generator filtered every preview as unsafe. Try softening the description or switching art style, then regenerate.
errors.previewTimeout: Generation timed out. Pick a faster model (FLUX schnell / Fast SDXL) or retry — Pony/Illustrious checkpoints warm up after the first hit.
errors.finalizeFailed: Could not finalize the character. Try again, or contact support if the problem persists.
errors.validationFailed: Please check your inputs and try again.
errors.insufficientTokens: You don’t have enough tokens to create this character. Top up on the Plans page.

auth.oauthError: Could not sign in with Google. Please try again or use email.

signup.title: Create account
signup.over18: I am 18 or older and agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and 2257 Statement

errors.underage: You must be 18 or older to register.
errors.mustAgree: You must confirm you are 18 or older and agree to the terms.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.

verifyEmail.failure: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a verification link.

dashboard.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address. Check your inbox for a verification link.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailHint: Your email is used for sign-in and cannot be changed here.

content.title: Content preferences
content.nsfwHint: Unlock mature content across the app. You must be 18+.
content.ageNote: By enabling this you confirm you are at least 18 years old.

account.title: Account
account.googleManaged: Your account uses Google sign-in, so there is no password to change here.
account.deleteHint: This deactivates your account and schedules all your data for deletion. This cannot be undone.

errors.weak: New password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.

account.exportHint: Download a copy of all your data (profile, conversations, characters, media, billing) as a JSON file.

gallery.title: {name}’s gallery
gallery.subtitle: Photos you generate with {name} will appear here
gallery.emptyHint: Ask for a photo in the chat — your generated images collect here.
